mapper.select: select conf_id, conf_name, detect_type, detect_pattern1, detect_pattern2, detect_pattern3, detect_pattern4, detect_pattern5, detect_pattern6, detect_pattern7, detect_pattern8, lenth_min, DATE_FORMAT(regdate,'%Y/%m/%d') as regdate, DATE_FORMAT(upddate,'%Y/%m/%d') as upddate, reguserid, upduserid from cotdl.tbl_piidetect_config order by conf_id
mapper.insert: insert into COTDL.tbl_piidetect_config (conf_id, conf_name, detect_type, detect_pattern1, detect_pattern2, detect_pattern3, detect_pattern4, detect_pattern5, detect_pattern6, detect_pattern7, detect_pattern8, lenth_min, regdate, upddate, reguserid, upduserid) values (#{conf_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{conf_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{detect_type, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{detect_pattern1, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{detect_pattern2, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{detect_pattern3, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{detect_pattern4, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{detect_pattern5, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{detect_pattern6, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{detect_pattern7, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{detect_pattern8, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lenth_min, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, now(), now(), #{reguserid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{upduserid, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.select: select conf_id, conf_name, detect_type, detect_pattern1, detect_pattern2, detect_pattern3, detect_pattern4, detect_pattern5, detect_pattern6, detect_pattern7, detect_pattern8, lenth_min, DATE_FORMAT(regdate,'%Y/%m/%d') as regdate, DATE_FORMAT(upddate,'%Y/%m/%d') as upddate, reguserid, upduserid from cotdl.tbl_piidetect_config where conf_id= #{conf_id}
mapper.update: update cotdl.tbl_piidetect_config set conf_name= #{conf_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, detect_type= #{detect_type, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, detect_pattern1= #{detect_pattern1, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, detect_pattern2= #{detect_pattern2, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, detect_pattern3= #{detect_pattern3, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, detect_pattern4= #{detect_pattern4, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, detect_pattern5= #{detect_pattern5, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, detect_pattern6= #{detect_pattern6, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, detect_pattern7= #{detect_pattern7, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, detect_pattern8= #{detect_pattern8, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, lenth_min= #{lenth_min, jdbcType=VARCHAR} where conf_id= #{conf_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select:
select conf_id, conf_name, detect_type, detect_pattern1, detect_pattern2, detect_pattern3, detect_pattern4, detect_pattern5, detect_pattern6, detect_pattern7, detect_pattern8, lenth_min, DATE_FORMAT(regdate,'%Y/%m/%d') as regdate, DATE_FORMAT(upddate,'%Y/%m/%d') as upddate, reguserid, upduserid from cotdl.tbl_piidetect_config
order by conf_id limit #{offset}, #{amount}

select db, owner, table_name, column_name, orderid, piitype, piicnt, detect_all_cnt, pii_ratio, DATE_FORMAT(regdate,'%Y/%m/%d') as regdate, sampledata from cotdl.tbl_piidetect_result
order by orderid desc, db, owner, table_name, column_name limit #{offset}, #{amount}
